# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Scope

What is included in this pull request?

## User-visible behavior

Describe any behavior that users, developers, or testers can see.

## Validation

List the commands or checks that were run.

- [ ] Build completed
- [ ] Tests completed
- [ ] Packaging checked if affected
- [ ] Sandbox manually checked if startup, input, rendering, UI, camera, scene, or transform behavior changed
- [ ] External project template checked if affected

## Documentation

- [ ] README or docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Runtime help or visible text updated if needed
- [ ] Known limitations are documented honestly

## Safety and repository checks

- [ ] No generated build output was committed
- [ ] No package output was committed
- [ ] No logs, screenshots, local settings, save files, or private files were committed
- [ ] No real game content was added to the engine repository
- [ ] No named third-party engine comparisons were added to repo text
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, tokens, or private user data were added

## Known limitations

List anything that still needs manual QA, polish, or a follow-up issue.
